## Scope

- [ ] Firmware (`firmware/*`)
- [ ] Host runtime (`mama/cmd/mama`, `mama/internal/*`)
- [ ] Setup UI (`mama/cmd/mama-ui`, `mama/internal/ui/*`)
- [ ] Docs / release process

## Validation

- [ ] `cd mama && go test ./...`
- [ ] Manual smoke check completed (if applicable)
- [ ] Added/updated tests for changed behavior
